sourcesContent:
const listOfPosts = [
  {
    title: 'Malta',
    date: '25 April 2024',
    description:
      'This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content.',
    image: 'https://source.unsplash.com/random?wallpapers',
    imageLabel: 'Image Text',
    link: 'blog/malta',
    category: 'travel',
  },
  {
    title: 'Post title',
    date: 'Nov 11',
    description:
      'This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content.',
    image: 'https://source.unsplash.com/random?wallpapers',
    imageLabel: 'Image Text',
    link: 'blog/rent',
    category: 'life',
  },
  {
    title: 'Post title #3',
    date: 'Nov 11',
    description:
      'This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content.',
    image: 'https://source.unsplash.com/random?wallpapers',
    imageLabel: 'Image Text',
    link: 'blog/rent',
    category: 'university',
  },
  {
    title: 'Switzerland',
    date: '25 April 2024',
    description:
      'This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content.',
    image: 'https://source.unsplash.com/random?wallpapers',
    imageLabel: 'Image Text',
    link: 'blog/switzerland',
    category: 'travel',
  },
];

export default listOfPosts;
